problem: The ticket requests adding a 'PX Logo' to the login page. Currently the sign-in page renders the Clerk <SignIn> component with no custom logo or branding. No PX logo asset exists in the repository. The GitHub organization is 'Project-X-Innovation', suggesting 'PX' refers to 'Project X'.

files.why: The sign-in page component. Renders Clerk <SignIn> with no custom surrounding content. Primary modification target for adding a logo above/near the sign-in form.
Center layout wrapping sign-in and sign-up pages. A minimal flex container (min-h-screen, items-center, justify-center). Could be modified to include a shared logo above the auth form.
Auth layout providing ClerkProvider with appearance config. The appearance prop currently only sets cssLayerName. Could be extended to customize Clerk branding/logo.
The sign-up page. Structurally identical to sign-in. If the logo is added via the shared (center) layout, it will also appear here.
Root layout. Sets favicon metadata and imports global CSS. Provides overall HTML structure.
Global CSS with Tailwind v4 and Clerk CSS layer ordering. Any logo styling would need to be compatible with this layer setup.
Directory holding all image assets (sponsor logos, boilerplate screenshots). No PX logo currently exists here. A new PX logo asset would need to be added.
Reference for how existing logos are rendered (uses next/image with static imports from @/public/assets/images/). Establishes the pattern for logo usage in this codebase.
App configuration including the app name ('Nextjs Starter'). No PX branding currently present.
E2E test that navigates to /sign-in and /fr/sign-in. Checks for 'Email address' text from Clerk. Adding a logo should not break this test but may need consideration.

facts: The sign-in page is at src/app/[locale]/(auth)/(center)/sign-in/[[...sign-in]]/page.tsx and renders only Clerk's <SignIn> component with no surrounding custom content.

The center layout at src/app/[locale]/(auth)/(center)/layout.tsx is a minimal flex container:
{children}
.
The auth layout at src/app/[locale]/(auth)/layout.tsx wraps children in ClerkProvider with appearance={{ cssLayerName: 'clerk' }} - no logo customization.
No PX logo asset (svg, png, or otherwise) exists anywhere in the repository. Grep for 'px-logo', 'px.logo', 'pxlogo', 'PX' returned no logo-related results.
Existing image assets live in public/assets/images/ and are imported as static next/image sources (e.g., import logo from '@/public/assets/images/...').
The project uses Tailwind CSS v4 with global CSS layer ordering: @layer theme, base, clerk, components, utilities.
The GitHub organization is 'Project-X-Innovation' (from ticket.md repo_url), suggesting 'PX' = 'Project X'.
The sign-up page has an identical structure and shares the same (center) layout as sign-in.
Quality gates: lint (ultracite with type-aware checks), check:types (tsc --noEmit), test (vitest), test:e2e (playwright), check:deps (knip), check:i18n (i18n-check).
AGENTS.md specifies: named exports only (except Next.js pages), absolute imports via @/, Tailwind v4 utility classes, no default exports except pages.
unknowns: No PX logo asset exists in the repository - it is unknown where the logo file will come from or what format/dimensions it should be.

It is unclear whether the logo should be placed above the Clerk sign-in form in the page component, in the shared center layout (affecting both sign-in and sign-up), or injected via Clerk's appearance API.
The ticket does not specify whether the logo should also appear on the sign-up page.
The ticket provides no design specification for logo dimensions, placement, spacing, or responsive behavior.
It is unknown whether 'PX Logo' refers to a specific brand asset that should be sourced externally or created as a text/SVG placeholder.
